locations.name: 让·路易·卡巴尼斯
locations.summary: 让·路易·卡巴尼斯（法語：Jean Louis Cabanis，1816年3月8日—1906年2月20日），法裔德国著名鸟类研究学家。 卡巴尼斯出生于柏林，1835年至1839年在柏林大学完成学业后，旅行到了北美，携带大量的自然标本返回德…

locations.name: 内格罗河省 (阿根廷)
locations.summary: 内格罗河省（西班牙語：Río Negro），或译黑河省，為南美國家阿根廷23省之一，位於阿根廷中南部，省会别德马。 参考文献

locations.name: 布宜诺斯艾利斯省

relations.subject: Creamy-bellied thrush
relations.evidence: The creamy-bellied thrush (Turdus amaurochalinus) is a species of bird in the family Turdidae. It is found in Argentina, Bolivia, Brazil, Paraguay, Peru, Uruguay, and as a vagrant to Chile and the Falkland Islands.Remsen, J

relations.subject: Creamy-bellied thrush
relations.evidence: In Argentina it occurs along the eastern slope of the Andes south to Río Negro Province and on the Atlantic to Buenos Aires Province. It has also been recorded as a vagrant in Chile and on the Falkland Islands. The creamy-bellied thrush inhabits a wide variety of semi-open to open landscapes
